title: Close-Up Portrait Actress Sadie Sink Red
sourceTitle: Close Up Portrait Actress Sadie Sink Red
prompt: A close-up portrait of actress Sadie Sink with red hair and freckles, smiling gently while lying down on a grey lounge chair at a tropical beach resort. She is wearing a cream-colored bucket hat with small embroidered yellow daisy flowers, a textured burgundy or maroon bikini, and several gold bangle bracelets on her wrists. The background features sandy terrain, tropical palm trees, wooden beach gazebos with thatched roofs, and a glimpse of the ocean under an overcast sky.
originalPrompt: A close-up portrait of actress Sadie Sink with red hair and freckles, smiling gently while lying down on a grey lounge chair at a tropical beach resort.
